steps.expected: Report page loads with trust score, risk level, and Download PDF button visible
steps.observed: Report page loaded showing Trust Audit Report with score 100/100, LOW RISK level, and Download PDF button clearly visible

steps.action: Take annotated screenshot of report page
steps.expected: Screenshot shows Download PDF button among page elements
steps.observed: Screenshot captured; Download PDF button identified as element @e5 (link 'Download PDF')

steps.action: Verify PDF API endpoint via curl GET /api/audits/{id}/report/pdf
steps.expected: HTTP 200 with application/pdf content type and valid PDF content
steps.observed: HTTP 200 returned, content-type: application/pdf, file size: 6169 bytes, header starts with %PDF-1.4 (valid PDF)

summary: Tested 1 assertion: 1 passed. VAL-UI-009 (PDF export) confirmed working — report page displays Download PDF button, and the PDF API endpoint returns a valid PDF (6169 bytes, %PDF-1.4 header) with HTTP 200 and correct content-type.
